---
title: "HiTOP-HSUM Instrument"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
toc: false
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{HiTOP-HSUM Instrument}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

Welcome to the HiTOP Harmful Substance Use Module (HiTOP-HSUM) instrument resources page. This questionnaire contains a total of 650 possible items across 3 assessment stages. Complex skip/display logic is used, such that the vast majority of respondents will only see a subset of possible items. Here you can download a DOCX summary file that can be printed and shared with IRB as well as ready-to-use imports for both Qualtrics and REDCap (both of which already implement the complex skip/display logic mentioned above). Scoring functions are still under development but should be available soon.

```{=html}
<style>
  /* Expand the main content area to full width */
  main.col-md-9 {
    width: 100% !important;
    max-width: 100% !important;
    flex: 0 0 100% !important;
  }

  /* Hide the empty sidebar container entirely */
  aside.col-md-3 {
    display: none !important;
  }
</style>

<h3 class="mt-4 mb-3">Ready-to-Use Downloads</h3>
<p class="text-muted">Choose the format that best fits your immediate research needs.</p>


<div class="row mt-4">
  <div class="col-md-4">
    <div class="card h-100 shadow-sm">
      <div class="card-body">
        <h5 class="card-title">📄 Printable Document</h5>
        <p class="card-text text-muted">Use these Microsoft Word documents for an overview or sending to the IRB.</p>
        <div class="d-grid gap-2">
          <a href="https://github.com/jmgirard/hitop/raw/main/inst/extdata/hitophsum_1.0_A4.docx" class="btn btn-outline-primary">English (A4 Paper)</a>
          <a href="https://github.com/jmgirard/hitop/raw/main/inst/extdata/hitophsum_1.0_US.docx" class="btn btn-outline-primary">English (Letter Paper)</a>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="col-md-4">
    <div class="card h-100 shadow-sm">
      <div class="card-body">
        <h5 class="card-title">📊 Qualtrics Import</h5>
        <p class="card-text text-muted">Use this specially formatted text file to easily import the instrument directly into your Qualtrics surveys.</p>
        <div class="d-grid gap-2 mt-4">
          <a href="https://github.com/jmgirard/hitop/raw/main/inst/extdata/hitophsum_qualtrics.qsf" class="btn btn-outline-primary">English (QSF File)</a>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="col-md-4">
    <div class="card h-100 shadow-sm">
      <div class="card-body">
        <h5 class="card-title">🏥 REDCap Import</h5>
        <p class="card-text text-muted">Use this compressed archive file to import the instrument as a new instrument in your REDCap project.</p>
        <div class="d-grid gap-2 mt-4">
          <a href="https://github.com/jmgirard/hitop/raw/main/inst/extdata/hitophsum_redcap.zip" class="btn btn-outline-primary">English (ZIP File)</a>
          <a href="../reference/generate_redcap_hitophsum.html#details" class="btn btn-outline-primary">Import Instructions</a>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<br>
```
